lab: chang chu ni de re qing shen chu ni shuang shou rang wo yong bao zhe ni de meng rang wo yong you ni zhen xin de mian kong rang wo men de xiao rong chong man zhe qing chun de jiao ao wei ming tian xian chu qian cheng de qi dao
lab_without_tone: chang chu ni de re qing shen chu ni shuang shou rang wo yong bao zhe ni de meng rang wo yong you ni zhen xin de mian kong rang wo men de xiao rong chong man zhe qing chun de jiao ao wei ming tian xian chu qian cheng de qi dao
raw_text:
唱出你的热情
伸出你双手
让我拥抱着你的梦
让我拥有你真心的面孔
让我们的笑容
充满着青春的骄傲
为明天献出虔诚的祈祷
